subject: Math
skill: Tell and Write Time to Hour and Half-Hour

lesson.story_mission: Set the Clock Tower for school, lunch, play, and bedtime using hour and half-hour times.
lesson.objective: I can tell and write time to hour and half-hour.
lesson.concept_explanation: Tell and Write Time to Hour and Half-Hour means using a math model, saying what you see, and checking that the answer fits.
lesson.common_misconception: The short hand points near the hour.
lesson.real_world_connection: Set the Clock Tower for school, lunch, play, and bedtime using hour and half-hour times.
lesson.lesson_summary: Use the model and careful counting to solve tell and write time to hour and half-hour problems.
lesson.mini_lesson: Use analog clock to reason carefully before choosing or writing an answer.

worked_examples.text: Watch the model first, then match it to the answer for tell and write time to hour and half-hour.
Demo: count, compare, or match each part before answering.

hint_ladder: Say the math words out loud.
Check your answer by doing the action again.

guided_practice.prompt: What time is shown on the clock?
hints: Look at the model carefully.
Count or compare one step at a time.
Check that your answer matches the question.
guided_practice.explanation: The short hour hand shows 1; the long minute hand shows 00 minutes, so the time is 1:00.

misconception_bank.hour_hand_confusion: The short hand points near the hour.
misconception_bank.half_hour_confusion: Half past means 30 minutes after the hour.
misconception_bank.hand_length_confusion: The hour hand is shorter and the minute hand is longer.
misconception_bank.reads_minute_as_hour: Read the hour hand first, then the minute hand.

story.text: Listen to the mission. This is Clock Tower Quest. We will practice tell and write time to hour and half-hour. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This is the lesson. Look at the words and the model. Press Next when you are ready.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Watch this example. The model shows one way to think. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This is a guided demo. Follow the model, then get ready to try one yourself. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This is the practice zone. Use the model, then choose your answer. Press Read Question if you want the question read aloud.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This is the challenge zone. Try the challenge. You can use a hint if you need one.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This is the checkpoint. Use what you learned, then answer the question. Press Read Question if you want help reading it.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: Great work. This badge celebrates your mission practice. Press Save Growth Data when you are ready.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This is your growth profile. It shows your stars, accuracy, hints, and what to practice next.
profile.label: Read This Page
